manipulated_prompt_obj.inputs:
<PAD><BOS_TOKEN><|START_OF_TURN_TOKEN|><|USER_TOKEN|>You are playing a text adventure game. I will describe what you can perceive in the game. You write the single action you want to take in the game starting with >. Only reply with an action.
For example:
> open cupboard

In addition to common actions, you can latory, tedne, derman, tuate, chross and sulphy.

Your goal for this game is: Make the tulacy enerk, the menny soriced and the ortid alism.

Once you have achieved your goal, write "> done" to end the game.

You are in a catint now. There are a sioust, a ortid, a menny, a unflued, a rist and a pacia. There is a passage to a penol here.<|END_OF_TURN_TOKEN|><|START_OF_TURN_TOKEN|><|CHATBOT_TOKEN|>
